title: Report on the implementation of Law Commission proposals: January 2023 to January 2024
body: "The Law Commission Act 2009 includes a number of provisions which are aimed at increasing the implementation of Law Commission proposals by the government. This report was written to set out implementation progress over the period 12 January 2023 to 11 January 2024, but it has also subsequently been updated to reflect further progress between January 2024 and the publication date of May 2025. "
